metrics.name: Value of Capacity Building and Advisory Services Provided
metrics.definition: Value of the investing organization's support for capacity-building efforts at investee companies as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Fund Managers: Considered for Investment
metrics.definition: Number of unique individuals affiliated with the organization who were candidates to manage client assets via funds and/or separate accounts during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Assets Under Management: Managed by Fund Managers from Historically Marginalized Groups
metrics.definition: Value of the investing organization's assets under management (AUM) invested with fund managers from groups historically marginalized due to race and/or ethnicity as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Companies Considered for Investment: Total
metrics.definition: Number of companies the organization considered for investment—that is, in the pipeline—during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Fund Managers: Total
metrics.definition: Number of unique individuals affiliated with the organization who were managing client assets via funds and/or separate accounts as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Value of Investments in Communities Historically Marginalized Due to Race and/or Ethnicity
metrics.definition: Value of the investing organization's assets under management deployed to communities that are predominantly populated by groups historically marginalized due to race and/or ethnicity as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Companies Considered for Investment: Led by Founders from Historically Marginalized Groups due to Race and/or Ethnicity
metrics.definition: Number of companies the organization considered for investment—that is, in the pipeline—during the reporting period that were led by founders from groups historically marginalized due to race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Value of Investments in Company: Outstanding
metrics.definition: Value of the investing organization's outstanding investment in a company as of the end of the reporting period. See usage guidance for details.

metrics.name: Value of Investments in Company: Total
metrics.definition: Value of the investing organization's investment in a company as of the beginning of the investment.

metrics.name: Employees Receiving Regular Performance and Career Development Reviews
metrics.definition: Number of permanent and temporary workers who received a routine and regular performance and career development review during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Withdrawn
metrics.definition: Volume of all water drawn from surface water, groundwater, seawater, or a third party for any use by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Discharged
metrics.definition: Volume of effluents, used water, and unused water released, during the reporting period, to surface water, groundwater, seawater, or a third party and for which the organization has no further use.

metrics.name: Average Daily Traffic
metrics.definition: Average number of vehicles per day using an urban road over the course of a year.

metrics.name: Leadership Demographics
metrics.definition: Describes the demographic groups in leadership of the organization, or disaggregates another metric in terms of one or more demographic groups in leadership. Particular thresholds apply to consider an organization "led" by members of a demographic group; see usage guidance for further information. Select all that apply: Gender: - 30% of Greater Female or Gender Non-Binary - Undisclosed - Other Disability Status: - Persons with disabilities - Persons without disabilities - Undisclosed - Other Race/Ethnicity/Minority Status: - Historically marginalized groups - Dominant culture populations - Undisclosed - Other Other target populations: - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Market Linkages Improved or Expanded
metrics.definition: Describes whether the organization improved existing market linkages or engaged new or additional forward or backward market linkages, including through its own integration, during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Founder Demographics
metrics.definition: Describes the demographic groups among founders of the organization, or disaggregates another metric in terms of one or more founder demographic groups. Particular thresholds apply to consider an organization "founded" by members of a demographic group; see usage guidance for further information. Select all that apply: Gender: - 50% or More Female or Gender Non-Binary - Undisclosed - Other Disability Status: - Persons with disabilities - Persons without disabilities - Undisclosed - Other Race/Ethnicity/Minority Status: - 50% or More from Historically Marginalized Groups - Undisclosed - Other Other target populations: - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Vehicle/Container Inactive Hours
metrics.definition: Average number of hours spent inactive or waiting (inclusive of turnaround and dwell time) by a vehicle or container during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Number of Employee Grievances Registered
metrics.definition: Number of formal grievances registered by employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Soil Health Practices
metrics.definition: Indicates which sustainable agriculture best practices the organization implemented to maintain and enhance soil health of agricultural lands during the reporting period. Select all that apply: - Application of regionally appropriate soil health improvement practices to maintain or enhance soil fertility and the physical and biological characteristics of soil - Monitoring of those soil health characteristics, including nutrients from different sources, that are necessary to maintain or enhance appropriate nutrient balance and soil health - Development and maintenance of an up-to-date nutrient management program that efficiently uses nutrient inputs and nutrients in the soil and crops to create optimum conditions for production and avoids nutrient loss to water and air - Other (describe) - Undisclosed

metrics.name: Wastewater Removed
metrics.definition: Volume of wastewater safely removed from client premises by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Board of Directors: Total
metrics.definition: Number of members of the organization's board of directors or other governing body as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employee Wages: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full- and part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Operational Certifications
metrics.definition: Describes the third-party, business process- and practice-related certifications that the organization holds as of the end of the reporting period. See usage guidance for further information.

metrics.name: Fair Hiring/Recruiting Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written employment policy to recruit employees fairly and equally and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Volunteer Hours
metrics.definition: Number of hours worked by non-employee volunteers who supported the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Environmental Management System
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has an environmental management system in place.

metrics.name: Waste Produced: Hazardous Waste
metrics.definition: Amount of hazardous waste created by the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions: Total
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gases (GHG) emitted as a result of the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Generated for Use: Non-Renewable
metrics.definition: Amount of energy both generated and consumed by the organization from non-renewable sources during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Purchased: Non-Renewable
metrics.definition: Amount of purchased energy consumed by the organization from non-renewable sources during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Healthcare Benefits Premium Covered
metrics.definition: Percentage of a full-time employee's healthcare premium that is covered by the organization or third parties, based on benefits available to full-time employees as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Full-time Wages: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full-time employees of the organization during the reporting period who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Female Managers
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time, female management employees (managers) at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Wage Equity
metrics.definition: Ratio of the wages paid during the reporting period to the highest-compensated full-time employee (including bonus and excluding benefits) compared to the lowest-paid full-time employee.

metrics.name: Threatened Species Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements policies to protect threatened species that reside in habitats affected by the organization's operations.

metrics.name: Value of Community Development Contributions
metrics.definition: Value of payments made by the organization during the reporting period towards activities that benefit local communities.

metrics.name: Employee Voluntary Turnover Rate
metrics.definition: Ratio of the number of permanent (full- and part-time) employees who departed voluntarily compared to the average number of permanent (full- and part-time) employees at the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Land Directly Controlled: Cultivated
metrics.definition: Area of land directly controlled by the organization and under cultivation. Report directly controlled land area cultivated during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employee Wages: People with Disabilities
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses, excluding benefits) paid to all full- and part-time employees of the organization with disabilities during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Total
metrics.definition: Volume of water used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Records System
metrics.definition: Describes the system used by a facility or service for record keeping, including whether it is paper-based or electronic, as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Gender Wage Equity
metrics.definition: Ratio of the average wage paid during the reporting period to female employees of the organization for a specified position compared to the average wage paid during the reporting period to male employees of the organization for the same position.

metrics.name: Part-time Employees: Hired
metrics.definition: Number of paid, part-time employees hired by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Recycled
metrics.definition: Volume of recycled water used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Social and Environmental Board Committee
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a formal board of directors or governing body committee dedicated to social and environmental performance.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: People with Disabilities
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time employees at the organization with disabilities as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Climate Resilience Strategy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a strategy to address the effects of climate change on the organization's operations.

metrics.name: Number of Legal and Regulatory Complaints
metrics.definition: Number of formal legal and regulatory complaints received by the organization during the last reporting period.

metrics.name: Founders: Total
metrics.definition: Number of the organization's founders who retain an active role in the company as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Average Employee Tenure
metrics.definition: Average tenure of employees of the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Community Engagement Strategy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a strategy to manage its interactions with local communities that are affected by its operations.

metrics.name: Governance Policies
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has written corporate governance policies that have been communicated to stakeholders.

metrics.name: Climate Resilient Water Management Practices
metrics.definition: Describes the type of climate resilient water management practices carried out by an organization during a reporting period.

metrics.name: Historically Marginalized Wage Equity
metrics.definition: Ratio of the average wage paid for a specified position to employees of the organization who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity compared to the average wage paid to employees of the organization who do not belong to these groups but have the same position during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Value of Carbon Credits Purchased
metrics.definition: Value of carbon credits purchased by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employees: Female
metrics.definition: Number of women in paid employment with the organization as of the end of the reporting period, whether they are full-time or part-time.

metrics.name: Energy Generated for Use: Renewable
metrics.definition: Amount of energy both generated and consumed by the organization from renewable sources during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Waste Disposed: Recycled/Reused
metrics.definition: Amount of waste disposed by the organization through reuse and recycling during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Land Directly Controlled: Treated with Pesticides
metrics.definition: Area of land directly controlled by the organization and treated with pesticides. Report directly controlled land area treated during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Conflict of Interest Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy to monitor and disclose any potential conflicts of interest between the organization and its board members, owners, or material investors.

metrics.name: Forest Management Plan
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a forest management plan.

metrics.name: Employment Benefits
metrics.definition: Describes the benefits that are provided to full-time employees of the organization during the reporting period. Select all that apply: - Health insurance - Dental insurance - Unemployment insurance - Disability coverage/insurance - Life insurance - Paid time off: Maternity/birth parent leave - Paid time off: Paternity/supporting parent leave - Paid time off: Vacation/holiday - Paid time off: Sick leave - Flexible work arrangements - Childcare support (on-site, vouchers, or reimbursement) - Transportation support (provided by company, vouchers, or reimbursement) - Retirement provisions - Stock ownership - Profit-sharing - Other (please describe)

metrics.name: Protected Area Connectedness Assessment
metrics.definition: Describes whether the organization has evaluated the continuity of natural habitats in protected areas as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Level of Water Stress
metrics.definition: Level of baseline water stress on land directly or indirectly managed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Low (<10%) - Low-medium (10–19.9%) - Medium-high (20–39.9%) - High (40–80%) - Extremely high (>80%) - Arid and low water use - No data

metrics.name: Loan Officers Employed
metrics.definition: Number of loan officers employed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Percent Female/Gender Non-Binary Ownership
metrics.definition: Percentage of the organization that is owned by female or non-binary individuals as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Municipal
metrics.definition: Volume of water drawn from municipal water sources used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Part-time Employee Hours Worked
metrics.definition: Number of paid hours worked by part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Caregivers Employed: Responsive
metrics.definition: Number of caregivers who are responsive to children's needs and who are employed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Historically Marginalized Managers
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time management employees (managers) at the organization who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: New Firms Entered
metrics.definition: Describes whether additional private sector firms entered the market in which the organization operates during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Total
metrics.definition: Number of paid full-time employees at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employees: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Number of people in paid employment with the organization who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity as of the end of the reporting period, whether they are full-time or part-time.

metrics.name: Energy Purchased: Renewable
metrics.definition: Amount of purchased energy consumed by the organization from renewable sources during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Level of Flood Risk
metrics.definition: Describes the flood risk level(s) of the region(s) and communities targeted by the organization during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Low Risk - Low-Moderate Risk - Moderate Risk - High-Moderate Risk - High Risk - Undetermined Risk

metrics.name: Worker Training and Transition Programs Offered
metrics.definition: Describes the skill development and employment transition support programs offered to members of an organization’s workforce.

metrics.name: New Market Entered
metrics.definition: Describes whether the organization entered a new market during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Median Non-Salaried Wage
metrics.definition: Median wage paid to non-salaried and full-time, part-time, or temporary employees of the organization during the reporting period. Employees who are salaried should be excluded from this calculation.

metrics.name: Permanent Employees: Hired
metrics.definition: Number of people hired by the organization during the reporting period, whether they are full-time or part-time.

metrics.name: Employee Feedback and Grievance System
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has in place a grievance mechanism to receive formal employee complaints and provide remedies, as well as an established procedure and/or committee to receive and handle employee feedback.

metrics.name: Meeting Frequency of Board of Directors
metrics.definition: Number of times the organization's board of directors or governing body met during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Regions with High Water Stress
metrics.definition: Volume of water used from regions with high or extremely high baseline water stress during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Departed Permanent Employees: Full-time
metrics.definition: Number of full-time employees who departed the organization (for any reason) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employees Covered by Collective Bargaining Agreements
metrics.definition: Number of employees of the organization who are covered by collective bargaining agreements.

metrics.name: Occupational Injuries
metrics.definition: Number of non-fatal occupational injuries sustained by members of an organization’s workforce.

metrics.name: Primary Energy Source
metrics.definition: Describes the primary source(s) for energy produced, sold, or purchased by the organization during the reporting period, or disaggregates another metric in terms of the primary source of the related amount of energy. Select all that apply: - Non-renewable sources: Coal Crude oil derivatives Natural gas Other (write-in) - Renewable sources: Biomass Geothermal Hydro energy Solar Wind Other (write-in) -Other low-carbon energy sources: Nuclear Other (write-in)

metrics.name: Stream Nutrient Levels Assessment
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has assessed nitrogen and phosphorus levels in streams on directly or indirectly controlled land as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Fair Compensation Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy regarding fair and equitable compensation for employees and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Critical Marine Habitats
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the marine and coastal spaces directly controlled, indirectly controlled, or used (such as for transport) by the organization include important marine habitats for species.

metrics.name: Full-time Wages: Historically Marginalized Management
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full-time management employees (managers) of the organization during the reporting period who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Social and Environmental Performance Staff Training
metrics.definition: Indicates whether any of the organization's employees participated in training sessions related to any aspect of managing environmental or social performance during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Stream Turbidity Level
metrics.definition: Level of turbidity (in Nephelometric Turbidity Units, or NTU) observed in streams or rivers on land directly or indirectly managed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employee Involuntary Turnover Rate
metrics.definition: Ratio of the number of involuntarily departing permanent (full- and part-time) employees compared to the average number of permanent (full- and part-time) employees at the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Conserved
metrics.definition: Volume of water usage reduced as a result of the organization's water conservation efforts during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employees: People with Disabilities
metrics.definition: Number of people with disabilities in paid employment with the organization as of the end of the reporting period, whether they are full-time or part-time.

metrics.name: Healthcare Benefits Participants
metrics.definition: Number of employees who received healthcare benefits through the organization’s programs during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Board of Directors: Independent
metrics.definition: Number of independent members of the organization's board of directors or governing body as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions: Direct (Scope 1)
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gases (GHG) emitted from direct emissions sources as a result of the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Social and Environmental Performance Management Training
metrics.definition: Indicates whether any member of the organization's board of directors participated in training sessions related to any aspect of managing environmental or social performance during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Traceability System
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a traceability system for its raw materials.

metrics.name: Temporary Employee Wages
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all temporary employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Market Share Increased
metrics.definition: Describes whether the organization expanded operations and increased market share during the reporting period in a concentrated market in which the organization was not a dominant player.

metrics.name: Ownership Demographics
metrics.definition: Describes the demographics of the ownership of the organization, or disaggregates another metric in terms of one or more demographic groups of ownership. Particular thresholds apply to consider an organization "owned" by members of a demographic group; see usage guidance for further information. Select all that apply: Gender: - 51% or Greater Female or Gender Non-Binary - Undisclosed - Other Disability Status: - Persons with disabilities - Persons without disabilities - Undisclosed - Other Race/Ethnicity/Minority Status: - Historically marginalized groups - Dominant culture populations - Undisclosed Other target populations: - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Workers Trained
metrics.definition: Number of workers (full-time, part-time or temporary; formal or informal) who were trained through programs provided by the organization (both internally and externally).

metrics.name: Community Service Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a community service policy.

metrics.name: Recycled Materials
metrics.definition: Amount of recycled material used in the organization's products (including packaging) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Worker Freedom of Association Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy to monitor, evaluate, and ensure its workers' freedom of association.

metrics.name: Forced Labor Policy: Child Labor
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy against child labor and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Groundwater
metrics.definition: Volume of groundwater used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Waste Disposed: Landfill
metrics.definition: Amount of waste disposed by the organization in landfills during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Departed Permanent Employees: Total
metrics.definition: Number of full- and part-time employees who departed the organization (for any reason) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Conservation Strategy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements an energy conservation strategy to reduce its operational energy usage.

metrics.name: Permanent Employee Wages: Female
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all female full- and part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Units/Volume Replaced
metrics.definition: Number of status-quo products that were replaced by products sold during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Part-time Employees: Employees with Disabilities
metrics.definition: Number of paid, part-time employees with disabilities at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Business Innovation
metrics.definition: Describes whether the organization adopted or operationalized a product, internal process, technology, or financing structure that was new or not widely used in the operating geography and sector during the reporting period. In order to contextualize the innovation, specify whether it was previously available in the operating geography and sector, by Impact Category: Financial Services: - Yes, by non-predatory informal alternatives such as family, friends, and community savings groups - Yes, by predatory informal alternatives such as loan sharks - Yes, there are a few other formal alternatives, but the market is young and not saturated - Yes, it is a mature market with several other formal alternatives, but the market is not saturated - Yes, there are several other formal alternatives and the market presents high saturation risk - None, our investee is the sole provider Clean Energy: - Yes, there are several other clean, on-grid alternatives and the market presents high saturation risk - Yes, it is a mature market with several alternatives (both clean and dirty; on- and off-grid), but the market is not saturated - Yes, there are a few other clean energy alternatives, but the market is young and not saturated - Yes, by informal alternatives which tend to be non-renewable and off-grid - None, our investee is the sole provider Other: - Other (write-in)

metrics.name: Workers Earning a Living Wage or Higher
metrics.definition: Number of individuals in an organization's workforce earning a living wage or higher.

metrics.name: Social and Environmental Performance Reporting
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization reports its social and environmental performance to relevant stakeholders.

metrics.name: Supplier Screening Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy of evaluating supplier organizations based on their social and environmental performance and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Client Protection Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy for client protection and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Reduced
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reduced by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Fair Career Advancement Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy to support the fair and equitable progression and promotion of employees and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Caregivers Employed: Professionals
metrics.definition: Number of caregiver professionals with current licenses or certifications, based on local requirements, employed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Social and Environmental Performance Incentives
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implemented any employee incentive schemes related to social and/or environmental performance goals during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Working Hour Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has policies in place to monitor, evaluate, and ensure appropriate working hours of employees, as well as a system to monitor compliance.

metrics.name: Training Type
metrics.definition: Describes the types of trainings completed by individuals as a result of the organization's activities during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Enterprise or business development training - Vocational or technical training - Anti-harassment training - Racial equity training - General social and environmental performance training - Undisclosed

metrics.name: Client Feedback System
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a feedback system to solicit client feedback and has an established procedure and/or committee to receive and handle client feedback.

metrics.name: Biodegradable Materials
metrics.definition: Amount of biodegradable materials used in the organization’s products (including packaging) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employee Policy Documentation
metrics.definition: Describes the types of policy documentation that are provided to employees of the organization.

metrics.name: Financial Statement Review
metrics.definition: Indicates whether it is the organization's policy to produce financial statements that are verified annually by a certified independent auditor.

metrics.name: Full-time Wages: Female Management
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full-time female management employees (managers) of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Caregivers Employed: Total
metrics.definition: Number of caregivers with current licenses, certifications, or trainings, based on local requirements, employed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Land Directly Controlled: Total
metrics.definition: Area of land directly controlled by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Hired
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time employees hired by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Bulk Cargo Handled
metrics.definition: Volume of bulk cargo transported through a road, railway, port, or airport during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Importance of Outcome to Stakeholders
metrics.definition: Describes the value or importance of the outcome being sought by the intervention or investment from the perspective of those affected during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Very important - Somewhat important - Neutral - Not important - Do not know

metrics.name: Percent Charitable Donations
metrics.definition: Percentage of the organization's revenue that was given as charitable donations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Total Personal Connectivity Devices
metrics.definition: Average number of connectivity devices utilized in each client household during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Percent Employee Ownership
metrics.definition: Percentage of the organization that is owned by individuals who are employed by the organization (full- or part-time) as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Scopes
metrics.definition: Describes the applicable types of greenhouse gases (GHG) emitted as a result of the organization's operations during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Scope 1/Direct Emissions (emissions from owned or controlled sources) - Scope 2/Indirect Emissions (emissions from purchased energy) - Scope 3/Indirect and direct emissions across the organization’s value chain

metrics.name: Loan Officer Wages
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses) paid to loan officers during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employees Earning Minimum Wage
metrics.definition: Number of full-time, part-time, and temporary employees of the organization that are earning the local minimum wage as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Full-time Wages: Total
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Teachers Employed
metrics.definition: Number of full- and part-time teachers employed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Biodiversity Assessment
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has undertaken biodiversity-related assessments to evaluate the biological diversity and ecosystem condition present on the land that is directly or indirectly controlled by the organization.

metrics.name: Toxic Materials
metrics.definition: Amount of toxic materials used in the organization's manufacturing processes during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Mitigated
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions mitigated by the organization during the reporting period, including GHG emissions reductions from both direct and indirect sources.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Types
metrics.definition: Describes the type(s) of greenhouse gases produced or mitigated by the organization during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Carbon dioxide (CO2) - Methane (CH4) - Nitrous oxide (N2O) - Hydrofluorocarbons (HFCs) - Perfluorocarbons (PFCs) - Sulfur hexafluoride (SF6) - Carbon dioxide (CO2) directly emitted from biologically sequestered carbon - Undisclosed

metrics.name: Full-time Wages: Management
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full-time management employees (managers) of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Minimum Wage Multiple
metrics.definition: Ratio of the average wage of non-salaried, permanent (full- and part-time) employees of the organization during the reporting period compared to the local minimum wage as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Waste Disposed: Total
metrics.definition: Amount of waste disposed by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Product Lifecycle Management Practices
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has practices in place to manage products over their life beyond the point of sale.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Female
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time, female employees at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Recycling Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a recycling policy in its operating facilities.

metrics.name: Employees Dedicated to Social and Environmental Performance
metrics.definition: Number of full-time equivalent employees dedicated to managing social and environmental performance during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Soil Conservation Practices
metrics.definition: Indicates which soil conservation practices the organization implemented during the reporting period. Select all that apply: - Application of regionally appropriate practices to minimize disturbance of and physical damage to soil, cropland, and pasturelands - Prevention of soil erosion, acidification, salinization, and accumulation of adverse compounds not otherwise specified - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Indigenous Rights and Stewardship Practices
metrics.definition: Describes the practices used by the organization to acknowledge and support the traditional knowledge, innovations, and practices of local Indigenous communities and enable their customary use of biological resources on land, freshwater, and marine areas managed directly and indirectly by the organization.

metrics.name: Part-time Employees: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Number of paid, part-time employees at the organization who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Occupational Fatalities
metrics.definition: Indicates the number of occupational fatalities of full-time, part-time, and temporary employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Board of Directors: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Number of members of the board of directors or other governing body as of the end of the reporting period who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Energy Conserved
metrics.definition: Amount of reduction in energy consumption achieved as a direct result of energy conservation and efficiency initiatives undertaken by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Waste Produced: Total
metrics.definition: Amount of waste created by the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Rainwater
metrics.definition: Volume of rainwater used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Green Building Practices
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization employs green building practices.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Avoided Due to Carbon Offsets Purchased
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions avoided through carbon offsets purchased during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Land Directly Controlled: Sustainably Managed
metrics.definition: Area of land directly controlled by the organization and under sustainable cultivation or sustainable stewardship. Report directly controlled land area sustainably managed during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Temporary Employees: Female
metrics.definition: Number of female temporary employees paid by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employees Promoted: Total
metrics.definition: Number of permanent employees who were promoted from within the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Occupational Illnesses
metrics.definition: Number of occupational illnesses which affected any full-time, part-time, or temporary employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employee Wages: Low-Income Areas
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full- and part-time employees of the organization who reside in low-income areas during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Number of Containers Handled
metrics.definition: Number twenty-foot equivalent units (TEUs) of cargo containers transported by a road, railway, port, or airport during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Percent Ownership by Historically Marginalized Groups
metrics.definition: Percentage of the organization that is owned, as of the end of the reporting period, by individuals who belong to groups historically marginalized due to race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Departed Permanent Employees: Involuntary
metrics.definition: Number of full- and part-time employees who departed the organization involuntarily during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Quality Practices
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization employs management practices to protect water quality.

metrics.name: Employee Training Costs
metrics.definition: Value of the costs incurred by the organization as a result of training provided to employees (full-time, part-time, or temporary) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Pesticide Hazard Classification Type
metrics.definition: Describes the pesticide hazard classification for pesticides used by the organization, or disaggregates another metric in terms of pesticide hazard classification. Select all that apply: - Class Ia Extremely hazardous - Class Ib Highly hazardous - Class II Moderately hazardous - Class III Slightly hazardous - Class U Unlikely to present acute hazard

metrics.name: Charitable Practices
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization employs charitable practices in its operations.

metrics.name: Waste Produced: Non-Hazardous Waste
metrics.definition: Amount of non-hazardous waste created by the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Land Directly Controlled: Impervious Surfaces
metrics.definition: Area of land directly controlled by the organization that is impervious to water during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Value of Fines and Settlements
metrics.definition: Value of payments made by the organization as legal or regulatory fines and settlements during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Social Responsibility Client Policies
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements policies to protect its clients.

metrics.name: Investment Committee Members: Total
metrics.definition: Number of members of the organization's investment committee as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Wastewater Treatment Compliance
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization's practices related to the discharge of wastewater comply with local legal requirements.

metrics.name: Marine Area Directly Controlled: Total
metrics.definition: Area of marine environment directly controlled by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employee Training Hours
metrics.definition: Number of training hours provided for employees (full-time, part-time, or temporary) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Stakeholder Engagement
metrics.definition: Describes the mechanisms in place to gather input from stakeholders on product/service design, development, and delivery. Select all that apply: - Identify community need(s), if any, in collaboration with target stakeholders - Consult with target stakeholders about their needs when developing strategy - Collect impact data from stakeholders via interviews and/or surveys - Work with investees to reflect target stakeholders' perspectives in product/service offerings - Monitor target stakeholder satisfaction - None - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Waste Reduced
metrics.definition: Amount of waste reduced by the organization during the reporting period through programs for substitution, recycling, or recovery.

metrics.name: Flexible Work Arrangements
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization offers flexible work arrangements to full-time, part-time, or temporary employees of the organization.

metrics.name: Worker Safety Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has policies in place to monitor, evaluate, and ensure worker safety.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Surface Water
metrics.definition: Volume of surface water used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Market Research on Clients
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization uses market research to identify the needs of clients and potential clients.

metrics.name: Gross Written Premium
metrics.definition: Amount of total insurance premium written or sold by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Board of Directors: Female
metrics.definition: Number of female members of the organization's board of directors or other governing body as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time employees at the organization who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Founders: Female
metrics.definition: Number of the organization’s founders who are female and retain an active role in the company as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Strategy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a strategy to reduce greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Managers
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time management employees (managers) at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employees: Low-Income Areas
metrics.definition: Number of people in paid employment with the organization who reside in low-income areas as of the end of the reporting period, whether they are full-time or part-time.

metrics.name: Full-time Employees: Managers with Disabilities
metrics.definition: Number of paid, full-time management employees (managers) with disabilities at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employees Earning Lowest Wage
metrics.definition: Number of full-time, part-time, and temporary employees of the organization that are earning the lowest hourly wage (including bonuses, excluding benefits) paid by the organization as of the end of the reporting period. See usage guidance for further details.

metrics.name: Waste Disposed: Incinerated
metrics.definition: Amount of waste disposed by the organization through incineration during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employees with Written Contracts
metrics.definition: Number of employees (including both permanent and temporary workers) who had written contracts for their employment during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Temporary Employees Hours Worked
metrics.definition: Number of paid hours worked by temporary employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Community Service Hours Contributed
metrics.definition: Number of hours volunteered by full- and part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Departed Permanent Employees: Voluntary
metrics.definition: Number of full- and part-time employees who departed the organization voluntarily during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Peak Flow Rate
metrics.definition: Rate of maximum flow of water through a stream or river on land directly or indirectly managed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employees Promoted: Female
metrics.definition: Number of female employees who were promoted from within the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Strikes and Lockouts
metrics.definition: Number of employees' strikes and lockouts at the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Investment Committee Members: Female
metrics.definition: Number of female members of the organization’s investment committee as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Part-time Wages: Female
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses, excluding benefits) paid to all female part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Average Non-Salaried Wage
metrics.definition: Average wage paid to non-salaried and full-time, part-time, or temporary employees of the organization during the reporting period. Employees who are salaried should be excluded from this calculation.

metrics.name: Energy Purchased: Total
metrics.definition: Amount of purchased energy consumed by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Consumed: Wastewater
metrics.definition: Volume of wastewater used for the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Part-time Employees: Female
metrics.definition: Number of paid, part-time, female employees at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Waste Disposed: Other
metrics.definition: Amount of waste disposed by the organization through other means during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Part-time Employees: Total
metrics.definition: Number of paid, part-time employees at the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Employment Benefits Uptake
metrics.definition: Percentage of all employees using employee benefits provided by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Permanent Employees: Total
metrics.definition: Number of people in paid employment with the organization as of the end of the reporting period, whether they are full-time or part-time.

metrics.name: Full-time Wages: Female
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all female full-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Temporary Employees
metrics.definition: Number of temporary employees paid by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Number of Employee Grievances Resolved
metrics.definition: Number of formal grievances registered by employees of the organization that were resolved during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Sexual Harassment Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy to combat and prevent the sexual harassment of employees and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Adaptation Needs Assessment
metrics.definition: Describes the specific adaptation needs of the region targeted by the organization. The adaptation needs can be described by a list of actions and resources required to complete all stages of adaptation process that respond to the specific climate shocks in the short and long term, starting with the specific climate vulnerability of the region and community targeted.

metrics.name: Social and Environmental Performance Risk Assessment
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization assessed social and environmental risks during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Streamflow Rate
metrics.definition: Rate of flowing water in a stream or river on land directly or indirectly managed by the organization as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Renewable Energy Expenditures
metrics.definition: Amount of money spent by the organization for renewable energy infrastructure and technology to produce energy intended for consumption at the organization's operating facilities during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Water Treatment Level
metrics.definition: Describes the level of treatment that discharged water received during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Primary treatment - Secondary treatment - Tertiary treatment - No treatment

metrics.name: Water Conservation Strategy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implements a conservation strategy to reduce its water usage.

metrics.name: Anti-Discrimination Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a specific, written anti-discrimination policy in place for its employees and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Local Compliance
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has been identified as out of compliance with any local labor, tax, or environmental regulations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Wastewater Treated
metrics.definition: Volume of wastewater treated by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Community Health Resilience and Improvement Strategy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization implemented a community health resilience and improvement strategy during the reporting period to improve health outcomes and increase the resilience of target stakeholder populations.

metrics.name: Fair Dismissal Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy and practice of ensuring fair dismissal of employees and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Diverse Representation Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the company has a written policy on diverse representation and a system to monitor compliance with this policy.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions: Indirect (Scope 2)
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gases (GHG) emitted from indirect emissions sources as a result of the organization's operations during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Generated for Use: Total
metrics.definition: Amount of energy generated and consumed by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Forced Labor Policy
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has a written policy against forced labor and a system to monitor compliance of this policy.

metrics.name: Permanent Employee Wages: Total
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all full- and part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Wage Premium
metrics.definition: Ratio of the additional average wage paid to employees of the organization compared to the average wage paid for a similar job in a similar industry or category and organization in the local market as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Mitigation Types
metrics.definition: Describes types of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions mitigation applied by the organization.

metrics.name: Waste Disposed: Composted
metrics.definition: Amount of waste disposed by the organization through composting during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Pesticide Use
metrics.definition: Amount of pesticides used during the reporting period on land area directly controlled by the organization.

metrics.name: Flood Resilient Construction Practices
metrics.definition: Describes specific flood resilience construction practices made to the housing units, buildings, infrastructure and surrounding areas.

metrics.name: Part-time Wages: Total
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Part-time Wages: Historically Marginalized
metrics.definition: Value of wages (including bonuses and excluding benefits) paid to all part-time employees of the organization during the reporting period who belong to groups historically marginalized on the basis of race and/or ethnicity.

metrics.name: Developmental Status
metrics.definition: Describes the developmental status of children served by the organization as of the end of the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Developmentally on track overall - Developmentally on track in language - Developmentally on track in executive function - Developmentally on track in health - Developmentally on track in social and behavioral skills - Developmentally delayed - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Water Quality Standards Pass Rate
metrics.definition: Percent of water samples at distribution or network sampling points that meet national standards for chemical water quality, residual chlorine, and microbiological contamination during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Length of Coastline Protected
metrics.definition: Total length of coastal areas brought under official protection status or subject to formal conservation measures (such as coastal buffer zones, community-led conservation agreements, or enforcement of no-development zones) as a result of the organization’s activities.

metrics.name: Availability of Basic Services/Facilities
metrics.definition: Indicates whether basic services are present onsite, along with a system in place to maintain them, as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Storage Capacity
metrics.definition: Maximum amount of energy that can be stored in the organization’s energy storage product (in MWh or MJ) as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Climate Vulnerability Status
metrics.definition: Describes the degree to which natural, built, or human systems are at risk of exposure to climate change impacts. Choose all that apply: - High - Medium - Low

metrics.name: Healthcare Facilities
metrics.definition: Number of healthcare units/facilities under the organization's management as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Discharge Rate
metrics.definition: Average discharge rate of the organization’s storage product , measured as the energy storage capacity divided by the discharge time, during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Distributor Organizations: Total
metrics.definition: Number of enterprises that served as distributors of the organization's products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: School Enrollment: Female
metrics.definition: Number of female students enrolled as of the end of the reporting period, both full- and part-time, with each discrete student counted once regardless of their number of courses.

metrics.name: Student Transportation
metrics.definition: Indicates if the organization provided transportation to students that needed or requested it during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Area of Seaweed Farm Certified
metrics.definition: Total area of seaweed farming operations certified by a recognized third-party sustainability or environmental standard as a result of the organization’s activities.

metrics.name: Distributor Individuals: Disabilities
metrics.definition: Number of individuals with disabilities who served as distributors of the organization’s products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Individuals: Rural
metrics.definition: Number of unique individuals residing in rural areas who were clients of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Sustainable Livelihood Opportunities Supported
metrics.definition: The number of individuals or households whose livelihood activities, income-generating pursuits, or productive assets have been supported, improved, or sustained through the organization's interventions during the reporting period. This may include support for employed or self-employed individuals, farmers, fishers, artisans, small business owners, or those involved in informal or community-based work

metrics.name: Responsible Financial Products/Services Offered
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization offers responsible financial products and services. See usage guidance for further information.

metrics.name: Units/Volume Sold: Total
metrics.definition: Amount of the product/service sold by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Renewal Ratio
metrics.definition: Percentage of the organization’s clients that stay enrolled in policies after their coverage term expires during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Units/Volume Produced
metrics.definition: Amount of the product/service produced by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Individuals Displaced: Total
metrics.definition: Number of individuals displaced as a result of projects supported/financed by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Average Supplier Agricultural Yield: Smallholder
metrics.definition: Average agricultural yield per hectare of smallholder farmers who sold to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Target Stakeholder Spending: Housing
metrics.definition: Amount of money spent by the average target stakeholder on housing costs during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Households: Urban
metrics.definition: Number of unique households in urban areas that were clients of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Packaging Weight
metrics.definition: Weight of packaging used by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Stored
metrics.definition: Amount of energy stored by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Number of Loans Outstanding
metrics.definition: Number of disbursed loans remaining on the organization’s balance sheet as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Area of Land Deforested
metrics.definition: Area of land deforested by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Payments to Supplier Individuals: Total
metrics.definition: Value of payments made by the organization to individuals who sold to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Units/Volume Sold: Lost/Leaked
metrics.definition: Amount of the product/service provided by the organization for free as a result of loss or leakage during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Disease/Condition Addressed
metrics.definition: Describes the diseases or conditions addressed by the organization's products or services provided during the reporting period. Select all that apply: - 01 Certain infectious or parasitic diseases - 02 Neoplasms - 03 Diseases of the blood or blood-forming organs - 04 Diseases of the immune system - 05 Endocrine, nutritional, or metabolic diseases - 06 Mental, behavioural or neurodevelopmental disorders - 07 Sleep-wake disorders - 08 Diseases of the nervous system - 09 Diseases of the visual system - 10 Diseases of the ear or mastoid process - 11 Diseases of the circulatory system - 12 Diseases of the respiratory system - 13 Diseases of the digestive system - 14 Diseases of the skin - 15 Diseases of the musculoskeletal system or connective tissue - 16 Diseases of the genitourinary system - 17 Conditions related to sexual health - 18 Pregnancy, childbirth, or the puerperium - 19 Certain conditions originating in the perinatal period - 20 Developmental anomalies - 21 Symptoms, signs or clinical findings, not elsewhere classified - 22 Injury, poisoning or certain other consequences of external causes - 23 External causes of morbidity or mortality - 24 Factors influencing health status or contact with health services - 25 Codes for special purposes - 26 Supplementary Chapter Traditional Medicine Conditions - Module I

metrics.name: Producer Price Premium
metrics.definition: Price premium percentage that the producer (supplier) selling to the organization obtains from the organization for its goods or services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Households: Receiving Free Products/Services
metrics.definition: Number of unique client households who received free products/services from the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Building Area of Energy Efficiency Improvements
metrics.definition: Area of buildings projected to receive energy-efficiency improvements as a result of investments made by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Discharged
metrics.definition: Amount of energy discharged (MWh or MJ) from the organization’s energy storage product during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Account Value
metrics.definition: Disaggregates a metric representing accounts in terms of the direction of their change in value during the reporting period. Select any that apply: - Increased in value during the reporting period - Decreased in value or stayed the same value during the reporting period - Other (write-in)

metrics.name: Client Households: Poor
metrics.definition: Number of unique poor households that were clients of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Supplier Individuals: Female
metrics.definition: Number of female individuals who sold goods or services to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Savings Premium
metrics.definition: Percentage price savings the client obtains by purchasing a product or service from the organization and the average price that they would otherwise pay for a similar product or service in the local market.

metrics.name: Sales Revenue
metrics.definition: Value of revenue received during the reporting period from sales of the organization’s products/services.

metrics.name: Client Individuals: No Direct Payment
metrics.definition: Number of unique client individuals who received products/services during the reporting period, for which no direct payment was provided to the organization at the time of service but for which the organization expects to be reimbursed.

metrics.name: Learning Hours
metrics.definition: Number of learning hours provided to students during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Demand Hours Type
metrics.definition: Describes the time frame in which the organization operated during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: - Peak - Off-Peak - Undisclosed - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Payments to Supplier Organizations: Local
metrics.definition: Value of payments made to local enterprises that sold goods or services to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Marine Environmental Pressures
metrics.definition: Indicates natural and human-induced pressures faced by marine environments.

metrics.name: Teachers Qualified
metrics.definition: Number of teachers at the organizations as of the end of the reporting period who have obtained training or have qualifications that meet or exceed the minimum requirements of the local area.

metrics.name: Area of Marine Habitat Protected
metrics.definition: Total surface area of marine habitats newly designated as Marine Protected Areas (MPAs), or new habitats added to an existing MPA network, as a result of the organization’s activities.

metrics.name: Number of Equity Investments Outstanding
metrics.definition: Number of equity investments on the organization’s balance sheet as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: Average Insurance Premium
metrics.definition: Average annualized insurance premium charged for a particular insurance product provided by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Individuals: Children/Adolescents
metrics.definition: Number of unique children and adolescents who were clients of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Purchase Price of Product or Service Replaced
metrics.definition: Indicates the average price paid in the local market by clients for a product/service that is similar to the product/service sold by the organization.

metrics.name: Units/Volume Purchased from Supplier Organizations: Total
metrics.definition: Units/volume from organizations that sold to the reporting organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Gross Earned Premium
metrics.definition: Value of premium earned by the organization as of the end of the reporting period, without any deductions for commissions or other expenses.

metrics.name: Average Supplier Agriculture Yield: Total
metrics.definition: Average agricultural yield per hectare of supplier individuals who sold to the reporting organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Promptness of Claims Submission
metrics.definition: Average number of days elapsed between the occurrence of an insured incident and the submission of a complete claim by the stakeholder (client of the organization) for all claims settled during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Hazardous Waste Avoided
metrics.definition: Amount of hazardous waste avoided through refurbishing, reusing, and recycling as part of delivering or developing the organization's products and services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Target Stakeholder Spending: Connectivity
metrics.definition: Amount of money spent by an average target stakeholder on connectivity costs during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Vehicle Distance Traveled
metrics.definition: Distance traveled by vehicles owned, operated, or sold by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Distributor Individuals: Low Income
metrics.definition: Number of low-income individuals who served as distributors of the organization's products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Length of Adjacent Protected Land
metrics.definition: Length of protected land boundary shared with the organization's protected land as of the end of the reporting period.

metrics.name: School Enrollment: Low Income
metrics.definition: Number of low-income students enrolled as of the end of the reporting period, both full- and part-time, with each discrete student counted once regardless of their number of courses.

metrics.name: Client Households: No Direct Payment
metrics.definition: Number of unique client households that received products/services during the reporting period where no direct payment was provided to the organization at the time of service but for which the organization expects to be reimbursed.

metrics.name: Client Individuals: Referred
metrics.definition: Number of unique individual clients of the organization who were referred by other clients of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Number of Complaints Registered
metrics.definition: Number of complaints registered by clients of the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Energy Generated for Sale: Non-Renewable
metrics.definition: Amount of non-renewable energy generated and sold to offtaker(s) during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Service Hours Interrupted
metrics.definition: Number of hours-of-service interruptions during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Supplier Individuals: Poor
metrics.definition: Number of poor individuals who sold goods or services to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Schooling Status
metrics.definition: Describes the schooling status of students served by the organization during the reporting period. Choose all that apply: Enrollment status: - Enrolled - Not enrolled - Other (describe) Grade promotion: - Promoted to next year of schooling - Repeated year of schooling - Dropped out - Graduated - Other (describe)

metrics.name: Jobs Created at Directly Supported/Financed Enterprises: Low-Income Areas
metrics.definition: Net number of new, full-time equivalent employees living in low-income areas and working for enterprises directly financed or supported by the organization during the reporting period. Many organizations select the beginning of the reporting period as the time when the organization began its support or investment.

metrics.name: Area of Marine Habitat Restored
metrics.definition: Total surface area of marine habitats that have undergone restoration activities.

metrics.name: Restoration Success Rate
metrics.definition: Percentage of restored areas that show measurable improvements in biodiversity, ecosystem function, or resilience post-restoration (e.g., survival rate of transplanted corals or re-established seagrass coverage).

metrics.name: Payments to Supplier Individuals: Female
metrics.definition: Value of payments made by the organization to female individuals who sold goods or services to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: School Enrollment: Total
metrics.definition: Number of students enrolled as of the end of the reporting period, both full- and part-time, with each discrete student counted once regardless of their number of courses.

metrics.name: Value of Community Facilities Financed
metrics.definition: Value of community facilities projected to be built, renovated, or purchased as a result of investments made by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Units/Volume Purchased at Price Premium
metrics.definition: Units/volume from individuals and organizations that sold to the organization and that have received a price premium during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Communities Served
metrics.definition: Number of individuals that benefited from a product or service from within the target stakeholder group, beyond the direct client individuals of the organization.

metrics.name: Number of Housing Units Constructed
metrics.definition: Number of housing units constructed by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Length of Coastline Restored
metrics.definition: Length of marine or freshwater coastline under management for ecological restoration on protected land, land under sustainable stewardship, or land under sustainable cultivation during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Earnings of Distributor Individuals: Female
metrics.definition: Earnings of female individual distributors as a result of selling the organization’s products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Supplier Individuals: Rural
metrics.definition: Number of individuals residing in rural areas who sold goods or services to the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Organizations: Provided New Access
metrics.definition: Number of enterprise clients that were served by the organization and provided access, during the reporting period, to products/services they were unable to access prior to the reporting period. For further clarification, organizations should reference New Access to Water, New Access to Energy, New Access to Education, New Access to Finance, or New Access to Healthcare in the glossary.

metrics.name: Earnings of Distributor Individuals: Low Income
metrics.definition: Earnings of low-income individual distributors as a result of selling the organization’s products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Individuals Housed
metrics.definition: Number of individuals projected to be housed in single- or multi-family dwellings as a result of new construction, loans, repairs, or remodeling resulting from investments made by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Jobs Maintained at Directly Supported/Financed Enterprises: Low-Income Areas
metrics.definition: Number of full-time equivalent employees who reside in low-income areas and work for enterprises directly financed or supported by the organization at the beginning of the reporting period and who remain at the organization as of the end of the reporting period. Many organizations select the beginning of the reporting period as the time when the organization began its support or investment.

metrics.name: School Fees
metrics.definition: Average school fees per student per month during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Distributor Individuals: Total
metrics.definition: Number of individuals who served as distributors of the organization’s products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Avoided
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions avoided due to the organization's activities.

metrics.name: Food Insecurity Experience
metrics.definition: Score describing the experienced severity of food security among a set of stakeholders defined by another metric or set. See usage guidance for further detail and resources.

metrics.name: Greenhouse Gas Emissions Avoided Due to Carbon Offsets Sold
metrics.definition: Amount of greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions avoided through carbon credits sold during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Client Individuals: Provided New Access
metrics.definition: Number of unique client individuals who were served by the organization and provided access, during the reporting period, to products/services they were unable to access prior to the reporting period. For further clarification, organizations should reference New Access to Water, New Access to Energy, New Access to Education, New Access to Finance, or New Access to Healthcare in the glossary.

metrics.name: Client Households: Provided New Access
metrics.definition: Number of unique households that were clients of the organization and provided access, during the reporting period, to products/services they were unable to access prior to the reporting period. For further clarification, organizations should reference New Access to Water, New Access to Energy, New Access to Education, New Access to Finance, or New Access to Healthcare in the glossary.

metrics.name: Water Savings from Services Sold
metrics.definition: Volume of water saved during the reporting period as a result of the organization's services sold.

metrics.name: Earnings of Distributor Organizations: SME
metrics.definition: Earnings of distributors that are small and medium-sized enterprises (SME) as a result of selling the organization’s products/services during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Marine Livelihoods
metrics.definition: Sustainable livelihood options made available to coastal communities that are primarily dependent on the ocean and coastal ecosystems.

metrics.name: Marine Biodiversity Assessment
metrics.definition: Indicates whether the organization has undertaken biodiversity-related assessments to evaluate the biological diversity and ecosystem condition present on the coastal area and marine habitat that is directly or indirectly controlled by the organization.

metrics.name: Individuals Trained: Total
metrics.definition: Number of individuals who received training offered by the organization during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Individuals Displaced: Compensated
metrics.definition: Number of individuals displaced as a result of projects supported/financed by the organization who were compensated for their displacement during the reporting period. Organizations should include type and amount of compensation in footnotes.

metrics.name: Supplier Screening Ratio
metrics.definition: Percentage of supplier organizations during the reporting period that were screened using social and/or environmental criteria.

metrics.name: Number of Potential Renewals
metrics.definition: Number of policies belonging to the organization’s clients that could have been renewed during the reporting period.

metrics.name: Level of Stream Connectivity
